headline: Will AbbVie's (ABBV) Pediatric Expansions Reveal a Deeper Shift in Its Growth Mix?
summary: Earlier this week, AbbVie reported European Commission approvals extending Skyrizi to children with moderate to severe plaque psoriasis and making Maviret the only therapy cleared in the EU for both acute and chronic hepatitis C infection from age three. These label expansions broaden AbbVie’s reach in immunology and virology by opening earlier treatment windows and adding pediatric populations in high-need diseases. We’ll now explore how Skyrizi’s new pediatric indication and Maviret’s...
